name: b300_24gpu_dgx_multibox
_comment: NVIDIA HGX/DGX Blackwell Ultra B300 multi-box deployment: 3 8-GPU boxes (3×8 = 24 GPU topology, 24 GPUs in active use). Intra-box: NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction) per GPU through 4 NVSwitch5 chips. Inter-box: ConnectX-8 XDR InfiniBand (800 Gbps = 100 GB/s single-direction per GPU through dedicated NIC), ~2.5 μs IB transport latency. A collective ≤8 ranks stays on nvlink5; collectives spanning 24 ranks escalate to ib (paying α = 0.5 + 2.5 = 3.0 us and being bandwidth-floored to 100 GB/s). Same chip as b300.8gpu single-box spec.
